title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Fabindia Online - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Fabindia Online - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Fabindia Online! We are hiring a Digital Marketing Manager for our Aurangabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Fabindia Online:
Fabindia Online is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Fabindia Online!
